notes: New Portfolio tab (5th bottom nav tab, off by default toggle in Settings > Layout — on by default): a dedicated view of your real share holdings, with a total-value hero card, a real Today's Change figure once you've refreshed prices, and a searchable list. Adding and editing holdings uses the same Add Shares / Edit Shares screens as Net Worth, so there's still just one place your holdings live.
Share price refreshes now also capture the day's real percentage and dollar change from Yahoo Finance where available, shown as green/red pills on each holding.
